page: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor operating at 3.7 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 (including VNNI and BF16) and cryptographic acceleration via AES and SHA_NI. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server includes 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. In benchmark evaluations, the E32ads_v6 demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance and strong multi-core Geekbench scores. Memory performance is highlighted by a strong PassMark memory score, though large-block uncached memory bandwidth remains in the average tier at 75.65 GB/sec for reads and 55.63 GB/sec for writes. The hardware shows top-tier performance in text generation for small language models, alongside strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and image processing capabilities.

The qualitative cost profile of the E32ads_v6 is characterized by its high memory density and bundled local storage, which reduces the need for external storage attachments for temporary data. This resource balance makes it highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, software compilation, and text processing. It is also well-suited for running small-scale LLM inference tasks and cryptographic workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 16 physical cores. It features 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB per core density, and includes 1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the x86_64 architecture supports AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core and multi-core CPU performance, alongside top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. The system delivers strong memory performance and multi-threaded decompression capabilities. This server is optimized for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and text processing tasks where local storage and high memory-to-vCPU ratios are required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, designed for database and memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: An AMD-powered, memory-optimized virtual machine with dedicated vCPUs, high memory density, and integrated local storage for demanding database workloads.

256.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory density
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core CPU and top-tier small LLM text generation performance
Optimized for memory-intensive applications, databases, and text processing
